title: Bike Lock Combination Lock 4 Digit |1.8M X 10mm| Heavy Duty Bike Locks High Security - Anti Theft Bicycle Lock for Motorcycle Fence Gate Shed Trailer - Weather Resistant
features: Easy-To-Set Combination: It's easy to set combinations for this bike lock. The initial combination code is 0000. Open the lock and turn the knob (adjustment lever) clockwise. Choose your new 4-digit code, then put the knob back where it was earlier. Your new code is now set. Don't forget to take a picture of your new code.
Size & Dimension: The 4-digit high-security combination lock is compatible with most bicycles and bikes and is 1.8 meters (6 feet) long with a cable diameter of 10mm.
Prevents Bike Theft: This anti-theft combination lock significantly reduces the risk of stealing your bike, keeping your valuable possessions safe.

Scratch-Resistant: The Polyvinyl Chloride (PVC) cover on this bicycle lock prevents scratches and damage to your bike's frame during regular usage. It also features a steel cable with PVC cover and a Polypropylene (PP) lock head for added durability

Multipurpose: The weather-resistant portable bike combination lock is suitable for bicycles, motorcycles, trailers, gates, sheds, and fences, offering high-grade security in a compact, lightweight, and portable design, providing peace of mind for your belongings.
description: Product Description Park Your Bicycle Anywhere Poles Secure your ride with ease by locking it to any pole, anywhere. Trees Anchor your bike to any tree and enjoy. Fences Easily lock your bike to any fence with our combination lock. Bike Racks Lock it, leave it, and love the convenience of our bike rack-ready lock. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Lost Keys? Not A Problem Combination locks eliminate the hassle of carrying and potentially losing keys. By remembering a simple code, you can effortlessly access your bicycle without fumbling through pockets or bags. Previous page Locking Scooters & E-Bikes Use it to secure e-bikes and scooters for peace of mind at work, shopping, or just taking a break. Secure Your Luggage Lock your luggage to a fixed object in a train or airport lounge to prevent theft. Lock Up Meeting Room Doors Use our combination lock to secure meeting room doors, providing an additional layer of security. Next page 1 Locking E-Bikes 2 Luggage 3 Doors Caution Always take a picture of your new password when you set it. If you forget it, you won't be able to unlock your combination bicycle lock.
